Class LegoSetManager

java.lang.Object
LegoSetManager
public class LegoSetManager extends Object
LegoSetManager Class This class manages a collection of LegoSet objects. It provides methods to add, delete, search, update, list, and load Lego sets from a file.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LegoSetManager()
    Default constructor Initializes the ArrayList that will store Lego sets.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addSet(LegoSet set)
    Adds a new Lego set to the collection.
    int
    countTotalPieces()
    Calculates the total number of pieces across all Lego Sets.
    boolean
    deleteSet(String legoSetID)
    Deletes a Lego set from the collection based on its ID.
    LegoSet
    findSet(String legoSetID)
    Searches for a Lego set by its ID.
    ArrayList<LegoSet>
    listSets()
    Returns the full list of Lego sets.
    int
    loadSetsFromFile(String filePath)
    Load Lego Sets from a text file.
    LegoSet
    parseSet(String line)
    Parses a single line of text into LegoSet object.
    boolean
    updateAttribute(String legoSetID, String attribute, String value)
    Updates an attribute of an existing Lego set.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • LegoSetManager

      public LegoSetManager()
      Default constructor Initializes the ArrayList that will store Lego sets.

  • Method Details

    • addSet

      public boolean addSet(LegoSet set)
      Adds a new Lego set to the collection. Prevents duplicate Lego set IDs from being added.
      Parameters:
      set - the LegoSet object to add
      Returns:
      true if the set was added successfully, false if the ID already exists

    • deleteSet

      public boolean deleteSet(String legoSetID)
      Deletes a Lego set from the collection based on its ID.
      Parameters:
      legoSetID - the ID of the Lego set to delete
      Returns:
      true if the set was found and removed, false otherwise

    • listSets

      public ArrayList<LegoSet> listSets()
      Returns the full list of Lego sets.
      Returns:
      an ArrayList containing all LegoSet objects

    • findSet

      public LegoSet findSet(String legoSetID)
      Searches for a Lego set by its ID. The search ignores uppercase and lowercase differences.
      Parameters:
      legoSetID - the ID of the Lego set to search for
      Returns:
      the matching LegoSet object if found, otherwise null

    • updateAttribute

      public boolean updateAttribute(String legoSetID, String attribute, String value)
      Updates an attribute of an existing Lego set. This method allows the user to update the set ID, name, piece count, price, release year, or recommended age.
      Parameters:
      legoSetID - the ID of the Lego set to update
      attribute - the attribute name to update
      value - the new value to assign to the attribute
      Returns:
      true if the update was successful, false otherwise

    • countTotalPieces

      public int countTotalPieces()
      Calculates the total number of pieces across all Lego Sets.
      Returns:
      the total piece count.

    • loadSetsFromFile

      public int loadSetsFromFile(String filePath)
      Load Lego Sets from a text file. Each line in the file must follow the format : ID-Name-Pieces-Price-Year-Age
      Parameters:
      filePath - the path to the input file
      Returns:
      the number of succesfully loaded Lego Sets.

    • parseSet

      public LegoSet parseSet(String line)
      Parses a single line of text into LegoSet object. Expected format : ID-Name-Pieces-Price-Year-Age
      Parameters:
      line - the line of text parsed
      Returns:
      LegoSet object if parsing is successful; null if line is invalid
